title: THE VOID // void.jar
description: A mod meant to be paired with the broken script (some events WILL break without it). Adds multiple other entities to your game.
body:
**This mod needs to be paired with The Broken Script for some events to work (and also for context on some events), download it here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)**


![...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5502770f594a487ebf1c643571d3524afe304a7.png)
ik this image sucks but modrinth wont let me put void.jar as a header so like yeah

**~~It's me.~~**

**THINGS TO NOTE:**

- It WILL crash your game at times.

- It WILL be loud.

- It WILL open popups on your computer.

---

The mod is VERY slow similar to TBS, and contains many entities and events (and more :D)

Im constantly adding more to the mod and learning new things, but DON'T play this mod if you wouldn't play The Broken Script (TBS).

---

Leaving the game WILL cause some events to break if they're currently happening. Please refrain from leaving the game until it is safe.

---

The mod is a work in progress, and more WILL be added in the future. Some things may be buggy, so just in case play with commands ON and keepInventory (if you want).

---

The ONLY real void.jar downloads are here and on CF. Do not trust any others.

---

This mod also uses some sounds from The Broken Script.

![I'm still here.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2c215b122d4de456ba567e8941859d7c96bcaf7_0.webp)








The end is nigh
